series_metadata.series_description: The Enforcement department does accident investigations and produces a report. Enforcement keeps the original accident report and sends Ride Safety a copy. Ride Safety produces a file by adding to their copy of the accident report their ride inspections, correspondence, and notes.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep for 10 years after the date of the accident then shred. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and verified as readable., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
